text: JSON-structured information extraction from scientific text (Nature Communications 2024) demonstrated that fine-tuned LLMs (GPT-3, Llama-2) outperform specialized NER models on joint entity recognition and relation extraction — extracting structured materials science data from 10K+ papers at 90%+ precision.

Multimodal information extraction (MIE) — combining text, images, and layout from documents — achieves 15-20% improvement over text-only IE on tasks like invoice extraction, identity document parsing, and scientific figure understanding, driven by LayoutLM and similar document AI models.
